name: sales-management-microservices
description: Sistema de gestión de ventas basado en arquitectura de microservicios

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend-react && npm install && cd ../usuarios-service && npm install && cd ../productos-service && npm install && cd ../ventas-service && npm install && cd ../inventario-service && npm install && cd ../facturacion-service && npm install && cd ../notificaciones-service && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: docker-compose exec mysql mysql -u root -ppassword123 sales_management_db < database/schema.sql

author: Development Team
